success_criteria: Agent points to the 'Forgot password' flow (30-min link, check spam), never asks for or sets a password itself.

customer_msg: I forgot my password and can't log in. Can you reset it for me?
agent_msg: Sure, I can help with that! To reset your password, please go to the sign-in page on our website and click on 'Forgot password'. This will send a reset link to the email address associated with your account. The link will expire after 30 minutes, so please check your email promptly. If you don't see the email, make sure to check your spam folder as well.

customer_msg: I've clicked the link and entered a new password. It says my password has been reset.
agent_msg: Great! Your password has been successfully reset. You should now be able to log in with your new password. If you have any other questions or need further assistance, feel free to ask!
